What We Do

Events we specialize in

🎉

Private Parties

Birthday celebrations, house parties, milestone moments — we bring the full bar experience to your space with custom cocktails and great energy.

💼

Corporate Events

Elevate your office mixer, client reception, or product launch with a polished bartending service that leaves a lasting impression.

💍

Weddings

Your wedding bar should be as unforgettable as your vows. Signature cocktails tailored to your theme, palette, and palate.

KB Cocktails 🥂💜

Mobile bartending for the moments that matter — crafted with care, served with style.

About KB

More than a bartender

NJ
Home base
NYC
We travel
100%
Mobile & flexible

KB Cocktails is a mobile bartending service built for people who want their events to feel elevated, intentional, and genuinely fun. We handle the bar so you can be fully present in the moment.

From signature cocktail menus tailored to your event to full setup and breakdown — every detail is covered. Professionalism, creativity, and great energy in every pour.

Inquire About Your Event
The Menu

Cocktails we craft

All menus are customized to your event. These are just a taste of what we can create for your guests.

01
Signature Spritz
House-made fruit blends with sparkling wine and fresh citrus. Light, refreshing, crowd-pleasing.
Party Staple
02
Classic Martini
Clean, cold, and perfectly balanced. Gin or vodka — shaken or stirred.
Timeless
03
Tropical Punch
Pineapple, coconut, and passion fruit with a kick. Made for warm celebrations.
Summer Fav
04
Custom Creation
You dream it, we build it. Tell us your vibe and we'll craft something one-of-a-kind.
Bespoke
05
Mocktail Menu
Non-alcoholic options just as beautiful and complex — every guest feels included.
Inclusive
06
Whiskey Sour
Fresh lemon, quality bourbon, and a silky foam top. A bar staple done right.
Classic
07
Sangria Pitcher
Red or white, served by the pitcher. Perfect for larger groups who want to sip and celebrate.
For the Table
08
Champagne Bar
Bubbly with garnish options and mix-ins. Perfect for weddings and milestone events.
Celebration
How It Works

Four steps to your perfect event

01
Reach Out

Send us an inquiry via email or Instagram with your event date, size, and vision.

02
Customize

We work with you to build a cocktail menu that matches your theme and preferences.

03
Confirm & Plan

Finalize logistics — setup time, location, headcount, and special requests.

04
We Show Up

KB Cocktails arrives fully equipped and delivers an exceptional bar experience.

Every detail, handled.

Full setup · Custom menus · Professional service · NJ & NYC

Important Info

Before you book

Please review our guidelines before submitting your inquiry. Our Highlights on Instagram include event guidelines, what to expect, and how we set up at your venue.

For all event inquiries, reach out via email or Instagram DM. We typically respond within 24–48 hours.
